---
title: "Serum PFOA and Cholesterol in a Synthetic Workshop Dataset"
author: "YOUR NAME"
date: today
bibliography: ../references.bib
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    link-citations: true
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)

biomarker_data <- read.csv("data/workshop_biomarkers.csv")
```

## Introduction

This report demonstrates a **reproducible workflow** using *synthetic teaching data*. It summarizes serum PFOA and cholesterol measurements for 200 simulated records from three Triangle-region sites. The goal is to practice connecting narrative, code, and output in one document—not to make a scientific claim.

::: {.callout-note}
## Synthetic data
The generated relationships are visible teaching examples and must not be interpreted as evidence about PFAS exposure or health outcomes.
:::

## Methods

The document reads a fixed CSV file and performs all calculations during rendering from a clean R session.

## Results

The dataset contains `r nrow(biomarker_data)` rows.

## Discussion

Results will be added in later checkpoints.
